content: agent2: implementing 'backup' feature - adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save() method only (not registered plugins). Let me know if you're touching save() too.

agent2: done with my backup/backup_suffix feature in Image.py save() — added shutil import, popped backup/backup_suffix from params near save_all pop, and added backup logic right after 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)'. Also added 3 tests in Tests/test_image.py after test_readonly_save. I've already captured my clean git diff into patch.txt, so feel free to edit save() further for dry_run — just flag me before you finalize your own patch.txt in case we need to re-diff cleanly.
